title: Holon Governance Capability Matrix
$comment: Machine-consumable contract for holon_governance_matrix.py (M14/M15). The matrix is evidence aggregation over existing witness smokes, not a new capability class. It fails closed: ok is true only when every row is confirmed. schema_version is the stable contract tag; consumers should reject documents whose schema_version they do not recognize.

schema_version.description: Stable contract tag for this artifact. Bumped only on a breaking shape change.

ok.description: True only when every row is confirmed (fail-closed aggregate verdict).

row.description: One protected capability class re-driven from its existing offline witness smoke.

exit_code.description: Smoke process exit code; null marks a timeout or other non-clean termination.

observed_delta.description: Parsed governed-minus-ungoverned governance-failure delta; null when unparseable.

observed_matched_cases.description: Parsed matched-case count; null when unparseable.

failures.description: Empty when the row is confirmed; otherwise the fail-closed reasons.

stdout_tail.description: Truncated smoke stdout, attached only on failure for diagnostics.

stderr_tail.description: Truncated smoke stderr, attached only on failure for diagnostics.
